creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Chase the migration of net/rrdtool to databases/rrdtool

Fix: 

Repocopy:
	net/p5-POE-Component-RRDTool	-> databases/p5-POE-Component-RRDTool

Change categories:
	net perl5 devel			-> databases perl5 devel

I volunteer to do the changes in the above mentioned ports.
